programmes.show_description: Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Spòrs ionadail, nàiseanta agus bho air feadh an t-saoghail còmhla ri Iain Moireasdan. Local, national and international sport presented by John Morrison.
Taghadh de cheòl dùthchail sean is ùr bho leithid George Jones agus Kimberly Kelly còmhla ri Marie NicMhathain. A choice of country music old and new with Marie Matheson.
Tha The Milk Carton Kids, Kris Drever is tòrr eile san taghadh ciùil aig Mairead NicIllinnein. The Milk Carton Kids, Kris Drever and more appear in Mairead MacLennan's playlist.
Cruinneachadh de dh'òrain bho sheinneadairean cliùiteach na Gàidhlig à tasglann BBC Radio nan Gàidheal. A selection of songs from BBC Radio nan Gàidheal's archive.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Còmhla ris an Urr Calum Dòmhnallach a bha os cionn Eaglais Shaor Chalanais mus do leig e dheth a dhreuchd. Service with Rev Calum MacDonald, former minister, Callanish Free Church.
Taghadh de laoidhean is sailm a chaidh a chruinneachadh airson Bliadhna nan Òran. A selection of hymns and psalms selected from the Bliadhna nan Òran / Year of Gaelic Song project.
Taghadh à prògraman na seachdain air a thoirt thugaibh le Anna Nic na Ceardaich. A selection from the week's programmes with Anne Sinclair.
Mìcheal Steele le taghadh de cheòl na pìoba. Mìcheal Steele presents a selection of pipe music.
Tha The Milk Carton Kids, Kris Drever is tòrr eile san taghadh ciùil aig Mairead NicIllinnein. The Milk Carton Kids, Kris Drever and more appear in Mairead MacLennan's playlist.
Podcast do luchd-ionnsachaidh ceangailte ris an t-sreath SpeakGaelic air BBC ALBA. Weekly podcast for Gaelic learners, accompanying the BBC ALBA series SpeakGaelic.
Litir Bheag na seachdain sa le Ruairidh MacIlleathain. Litir àireamh 1088. This week's short letter for Gàidhlig learners.
Podcast do luchd-ionnsachaidh na Gàidhlig ceangailte ris an t-sreath SpeakGaelic air BBC ALBA. Weekly podcast for Gaelic learners, accompanying the BBC ALBA series, SpeakGaelic.
Litir do Luchd-ionnsachaidh le Ruairidh MacIlleathain. Litir àireamh 1392. Roddy Maclean reads this week's letter for Gàidhlig learners.
Prògram de cheòl Ceilteach ùr nòsach à Alba is Èirinn. Contemporary Celtic music from Scotland and Ireland.
Còmhla ris an Urr Calum Dòmhnallach a bha os cionn Eaglais Shaor Chalanais mus do leig e dheth a dhreuchd. Service with Rev Calum MacDonald, former minister, Callanish Free Church.
Prògram a tasglann Fàilte air a' Bhaile. Tha Dòmhnall MacColla a' còmhradh ri muinntir na sgìre san Dùn Beag ann an 1987. Fàilte air a Bhaile in Dunbeg in 1987, from the archive.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
Còmhla ris an Urr Tormod MacSuain nach maireann, Àrd-eaglais Steòrnabhaigh ann an 1992. Conducted by the late Rev Norman MacSween, minister of Stornoway High Church, 1992.
Taghadh à prògraman na seachdain air a thoirt thugaibh le Anna Nic na Ceardaich. A selection from the week's programmes with Anne Sinclair.
Tha BBC Radio nan Gaidheal mar BBC Radio Alba. BBC Radio nan Gaidheal joins BBC Radio Scotland.
